caption: A man wearing a black t-shirt, a gold chain, and a blue and white baseball cap is speaking into a professional microphone during a podcast recording. He is wearing over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a light-colored wall with various logos. To his left, a vertical sign displays the word "HUSTLE" repeated with stars beneath it. In the foreground, on-screen graphics include a logo for "STUDIO PODCAST" and text that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Behind him, a larger sign features the words "TALK 101" and "BOSS". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a seated position, speaking with his mouth open and head slightly tilted, while the camera maintains a static medium shot. His expression and posture shift slightly as he talks, but the overall setting and his attire remain consistent.
